prompt: Generate a 1-slide PowerPoint comparing three hydrogen production methods (Grey, Blue, Green) with a structured comparison table showing Production process, CO2 emissions, Investment scale, EPC duration, and Link to power sector. Include footnotes and sources.

Generate a 1-slide PowerPoint showing global H2 demand and production costs from 2018 to 2050. Include a data table with rows for years (2018, 2030, 2050) and columns for Global H2 demand (Mt p.a.), Grey H2 share, Blue+Green H2 share, and production costs per type ($/kg). Add a legend for least-cost and 2nd least-cost options.

Generate a 1-slide PowerPoint comparing the EV market across three regions (China, Europe, US). Include a comparison table with rows for Market size (2024), Growth rate, Key players, Government incentives, Charging infrastructure, and Market outlook. Use data-rich content with specific numbers.
